description_long: This is a medium-sized, round yellow onion with a slightly flattened top and bottom. The exterior is covered in a thin, papery, light brown to tan skin with subtle orange and yellow hues, showing some natural blemishes and color variations. The base of the onion features a visible root tuft with short, fibrous, off-white roots, while the top is closed and does not display any green shoots. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, with the characteristic layered structure of an onion bulb subtly visible beneath the skin. The onion is intact, with no significant peeling or damage, and its overall form is plump and firm, typical of a fresh onion found in markets or kitchens.
description: A round, yellow-brown onion with a papery skin, visible root tuft, and subtle layered texture. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with natural color variations.
description_view_0: This view shows the onion's base with a prominent root tuft and the papery skin's texture and color variations.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the smooth, rounded surface and subtle color gradients, with no root tuft visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the root tuft and more of the onion's layered structure beneath the skin.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side from the root tuft, showing a smooth, unblemished surface with gentle color transitions.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with subtle indications of layered segments beneath the skin, but no distinct lobes or separations are visible.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is fully intact, covering the entire onion. It is light brown to tan in color with a matte, slightly rough texture and some natural blemishes.
attribute_root_tuft: A root tuft is present at the base, consisting of short, dense, off-white fibrous roots.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible emerging from the onion.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: No urban elements or contextual surfaces are visible; the onion appears isolated on a neutral background with no indication of indoor or outdoor placement.
